ddls:
CREATE TABLE "students" (
  "student_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each student */,
  "roll_no" TEXT /* Roll number of the student */,
  "name" TEXT /* Full name of the student */,
  "college_id" INTEGER /* ID of the college the student belongs to */,
  "date_of_birth" TEXT /* Date of birth of the student */,
  "gender" TEXT /* Gender of the student */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the student */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the student */,
  "address" TEXT /* Address of the student */,
  "enrollment_date" TEXT /* Date when the student enrolled */,
  "graduation_date" TEXT /* Expected or actual graduation date of the student */,
  "status" TEXT /* Current status of the student (e.g., enrolled, graduated, dropped out) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("student_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_students_college_id FOREIGN KEY ("college_id") REFERENCES colleges ("college_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "colleges" (
  "college_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each college */,
  "college_name" TEXT /* Name of the college */,
  "department" TEXT /* Department to which the college belongs */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location of the college */,
  "establishment_year" INTEGER /* Year the college was established */,
  "website" TEXT /* Website of the college */,
  "contact_number" TEXT /* Contact number of the college */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("college_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "semesters" (
  "semester_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each semester */,
  "semester_name" TEXT /* Name of the semester (e.g., Sem-I, Sem-II, Sem-III) */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the semester */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* End date of the semester */,
  "academic_year" TEXT /* Academic year (e.g., 2022-2023) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("semester_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "student_grades" (
  "grade_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each grade record */,
  "student_id" INTEGER /* ID of the student */,
  "semester_id" INTEGER /* ID of the semester */,
  "course_id" INTEGER /* ID of the course */,
  "course_name" TEXT /* Name of the course */,
  "grade" REAL /* Grade obtained by the student in the semester */,
  "credit_hours" INTEGER /* Credit hours of the course */,
  "letter_grade" TEXT /* Letter grade obtained by the student (e.g., A, B, C) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("grade_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_student_grades_semester_id FOREIGN KEY ("semester_id") REFERENCES semesters ("semester_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_student_grades_student_id FOREIGN KEY ("student_id") REFERENCES students ("student_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "overall_performance" (
  "performance_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each performance record */,
  "student_id" INTEGER /* ID of the student */,
  "overall_cgpa" REAL /* Overall CGPA of the student */,
  "total_credits" INTEGER /* Total number of credit hours completed by the student */,
  "total_grade_points" REAL /* Total grade points accumulated by the student */,
  "semester_count" INTEGER /* Number of semesters completed by the student */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("performance_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_overall_performance_student_id FOREIGN KEY ("student_id") REFERENCES students ("student_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., admin, faculty, student) */,
  "password" TEXT /* Password of the user */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last login */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the user account was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update to the user account */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Active status of the user account */,
  "permissions" TEXT /* Permissions assigned to the user */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)
column_names: ID of the college the student belongs to
Date of birth of the student
Expected or actual graduation date of the student
Current status of the student (e.g., enrolled, graduated, dropped out)
Department to which the college belongs
